OSA.text: Ops note: Namba is efficient for central meetings, while Shinsekai tends to be louder after 22:00. Umeda can support polished dinners, but some partner bundles stop working after late check-in.

TPE.text: Ops note: Xinyi works best for conference mornings. Airport access is smoother from the blue-line corridor, and expo nights can make scenic outer areas slower than they look. Badge-enabled partner rooms can matter.

SIN.text: Ops note: One-North is dependable for business travel during wet weather. Marina dinners can look polished but add transfer overhead, while shuttle-linked bundles hold up better on rainy nights.
